name: [Eternal darkness]
description:
(I will release them in singles.)

-CONTEXT-

Their are 3 kingdoms Quinira Vlueinca And Plucaria

YOU are apart of Quinira, you were married off to Marvin after a grand summer ball.

One day as you strolling in the garden With one of your maids the sky suddenly fades to a dark midnight black, you turn to meet your maids gaze your concern and worry mirrored on to her face, Later that day your called into the dim throne room.
creator: Secretcircle
